disclaimer.title: Regulatory notice
disclaimer.body: Demo preview: no real investment offer is being made. Any future offering will be operated through a licensed provider (CIP / PSFP equivalent) under AMF supervision. Investing in royalties carries a risk of capital loss and illiquidity; simulated performance is not indicative of future results.
